name: Chocolate-Walnut Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Line an 8x8-inch metal baking pan with plastic wrap, smoothing it out as much as possible.
2. Coarsely chop the chocolate and walnuts.
3. In a heavy 2-quart saucepan over medium-low heat, melt the chocolate and sweetened condensed milk together, stirring constantly until smooth.
4. Add the chopped walnuts, vanilla extract, and salt to the melted mixture.
5. Pour the chocolate mixture into the prepared pan.
6. Refrigerate for 3 hours or until firm.
7. Remove from the pan and cut into 6 strips.
8. Cut each strip crosswise into 6 pieces.
9. Store in a tightly covered container at room temperature.
10. Makes 36 pieces, with approximately 120 calories, 7 grams of fat, 4 milligrams of cholesterol, and 25 milligrams of sodium per serving.
